content_body: Thank you so much for sharing this piece of heaven on earth. The Sanctuary truly surpassed all of our expectations. The views are awe inspiring and you truly thought of everything to make your home comfortable. The Sanctuary has become our little secret, hideaway and we will definetly come back again and again and again ... If you ever decide to sell, please give us a call. Until next time ....
title: Sanctuary Surpassed All Expectations
